description: Correct-but-unoptimized PolyBench-style fixed-size integer ATAX (y = A^T*(A*x), M=N=16). Optimization-loop demo: csim already PASSES; the inner multiply-accumulate loops run sequentially, leaving real PPA headroom. Pipelining the inner loops (#pragma HLS PIPELINE II=1) and cyclically partitioning A/x parallelizes the multiply-accumulate -> large latency drop without changing results. Demonstrator for the auto-derive throughput-target probe: NO throughput_target is hand-set.
expected: csim_pass=true; optimize lowers latency while keeping csim_pass=true
